startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: List of start URLs. Defaults to https://indianroommates.sulekha.com/rentals

maxItems.title: Max Items
maxItems.description: Maximum number of rental ads to save (to both dataset and Firestore). Default is 2. Set to 0 for no limit.

firebaseServiceAccount.title: Firebase Credential (Service Account or Web Config JSON)
firebaseServiceAccount.description:
Two options:

 OPTION A (Recommended) — Service Account JSON:
 Go to Firebase Console → Project Settings → Service Accounts → Generate new private key. Paste the downloaded JSON here.

 OPTION B — Web Config JSON:
 Go to Firebase Console → Project Settings → General → Your apps → npm config snippet. Paste the firebaseConfig object here ({ apiKey, authDomain, projectId, ... }). Note: Option B requires Firestore security rules that permit writes, or set GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS env var.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl in parallel.

maxRequestRetries.title: Max Request Retries
maxRequestRetries.description: Maximum number of times to retry a failed request.

requestTimeoutSecs.title: Request Timeout (seconds)
requestTimeoutSecs.description: Timeout for each page request in seconds.

minDelayMs.title: Min Delay Between Requests (ms)
minDelayMs.description: Minimum random delay between requests in milliseconds.

maxDelayMs.title: Max Delay Between Requests (ms)
maxDelayMs.description: Maximum random delay between requests in milliseconds.

useProxy.title: Use Proxy
useProxy.description: Whether to use Apify Proxy for requests.

proxyConfig.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfig.description: Apify Proxy configuration. Only used when useProxy is true.

interceptApiCalls.title: Intercept API Calls
interceptApiCalls.description: Whether to intercept XHR/fetch network requests to capture API payloads.

extractNextData.title: Extract __NEXT_DATA__
extractNextData.description: Whether to extract window.__NEXT_DATA__ from pages.

extractLdJson.title: Extract LD+JSON
extractLdJson.description: Whether to extract script[type=application/ld+json] structured data.

maxPaginationPages.title: Max Pagination Pages
maxPaginationPages.description: Maximum number of listing/pagination pages to crawl per category. 0 = no limit.

googleMapsApiKey.title: Google Maps API Key
googleMapsApiKey.description: Google Maps Geocoding API key. Used to enrich scraped ads with lat/lng, city, state, country, district and metroArea from the property's ZIP code. Get it from https://console.cloud.google.com → APIs & Services → Credentials. Requires the Geocoding API to be enabled.
